In whose house did walk the good, beautiful, shining Ashi Vanguhi, in the shape of a maid fair of body, most strong, tall-formed, high-up girded, pure, nobly bom of a glorious seed * ; who, rushing to the battle, knew how to make room for himself with his own arms ; who, rushing to the battle, knew how to fight the foe with his own arms *.
